title: senna absus
intro: Senna absus, also known as black cotton or wild senna, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to tropical Africa and Asia. The plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include being a natural laxative and having anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of senna absus include treating digestive issues such as constipation, diarrhea, and irritable bowel syndrome, as well as providing relief from skin conditions like eczema and acne. Senna absus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed under the guidance of a healthcare professional to reap its benefits.
